_comment: POST /api/v1/application-configs — Keycloak on platform-services (login.podzone.cloud); depends on cloudnative-pg
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @application-configs/keycloak-platform-services.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/application-configs
